description: Create hooks/skill-auto-load-check.sh - reads ~/.claude/agentic-engineering.json, emits skill-load instruction to stdout when skill_auto_load==true, always-emit no sentinel, module manifest required
acceptance_criteria: Emits skill-load instruction on every invocation when skill_auto_load==true

description: Update ae_write_config in all 8 install.sh scripts to use read-modify-write (not overwrite), add skill_auto_load key with fresh-install prompt (key-absent only), preserve existing value on re-run
acceptance_criteria: All 8 install scripts use read-modify-write for ae_write_config
skill_auto_load key prompted only on fresh install (key absent)
Existing skill_auto_load value preserved on re-run

description: Update .kimi/hooks/session-start.sh to emit skill-load instruction when skill_auto_load==true; preserve stderr banner; verify stdout routing first, fall back to stderr with comment if unrouted
acceptance_criteria: Fallback documented if stdout not routed to agent context

description: Add prominent re-run notice to .cursor/install.sh output for existing Cursor users. No hook change.
acceptance_criteria: Notice is prominent (not buried in output)

description: Update .opencode/plugins/session-context.ts to add session.created handler that reads ~/.config/opencode/agentic-engineering.json for skill_auto_load and emits skill-load instruction. Update plugin manifest trigger events.
acceptance_criteria: session.created handler added (or session.idle first-run guard via pluginData)

description: Add second UserPromptSubmit hook entry in .claude/install.sh calling skill-auto-load-check.sh. Idempotent: check for existing entry before inserting.

description: Add second UserPromptSubmit entry in .codex/config/hooks.json calling skill-auto-load-check.sh. Path pattern matches existing risk-reminder.sh entry. Symlinked - live immediately.

description: Add second BeforeAgent hook entry in .gemini/install.sh calling skill-auto-load-check.sh. Idempotent check for existing entry.
